boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations activate the production device group?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; calibration-status class pending
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-GAC-087-P requires calibration-status class match before activation
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Pending CP-77 blocks closure per policy

final_answer: Source records show activation boundary open. CAL-GAC-087 confirms pending CP-77 and separate status-class verification required by WARN-GAC-087 and STD-GAC-087-P. ACT-GAC-087 alone does not close the boundary. Escalate for calibration completion before any activation decision.
